notes: Smoke proves current UI export creates a parseable v8 .landroid package with side-store keys and no legacy pdfData key after the Documents registry readiness gate is observed.
Smoke proves destructive .landroid import uses typed LOAD WORKSPACE confirmation and rejects incorrect confirmation text before replacement.

A prior immediate-export attempt, before waiting for Documents readiness, produced a much smaller package with zero exported documents; Phase 0 should treat early export timing as a behavior/risk to verify before rebuild.
This does not prove future-version rejection or v7 orphan recovery; those remain unit/golden fixture concerns.
